gigapan.description:
Taken from the top of a shipping container at the shipyard.

This is the last gigapan I took before the unit took a lens-first death leap from the top of this very shipping container.

focal length 137mm

Pictures of the aftermath of the gigapan death leap here:
http://www.flickr.com/photos/rich_gibson/sets/72157605626723048/

Here is an image of the same location, but from a different angle, taken Jan 16th, 2010 - you can compare what has, and has not, changed at the Shipyard in the intervening 18 months.
http://www.gigapan.org/gigapans/41437/

Here is the GEK assembly room Jan 16th, 2010
http://www.gigapan.org/gigapans/41375/
